title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at SRL Diagnostics

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at SRL Diagnostics
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? SRL Diagnostics in Visakhapatnam offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About SRL Diagnostics:
SRL Diagnostics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SRL Diagnostics!
